purpose: Deterministic 10-document realistic starter corpus for I-9 eval generation from a reviewed synthetic profile.

intentionallyMissing.reason: The reviewed alex-i9-test profile declares contact.phone as null for i-9.
intentionallyMissing.expectedBehavior: Leave the corresponding form field blank; do not guess or synthesize a value.

documents.title: Driver License Transcript
documents.brief: Driver License Transcript: Write as a DMV-style transcript with realistic headers, status dates, and export artifacts. Use only the supplied profile slice for canonical current facts. Declared facts: identity.legalName, identity.dateOfBirth, address.current.street, address.current.unit, address.current.city, address.current.state, address.current.postalCode. Include every declared fact at least once using the exact profile value or a validator-supported value variant, even if the document also uses realistic alternate formatting. Do not invent intentionally missing facts: contact.phone. Avoid placeholder text such as Current Date, To Be Completed, or fake bracketed values.

documents.title: SSN Card Transcript
documents.brief: SSN Card Transcript: Write as a careful transcript of a Social Security card, with limited surrounding context. Use only the supplied profile slice for canonical current facts. Declared facts: identity.legalName, identity.ssn. Include every declared fact at least once using the exact profile value or a validator-supported value variant, even if the document also uses realistic alternate formatting. Do not invent intentionally missing facts: contact.phone. Avoid placeholder text such as Current Date, To Be Completed, or fake bracketed values.
